title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.2 - Practice now has only Stable and Tuned 1 (Retain removed). Stable keyword description clarified: "May not be modified or turned Unplayable during combat."
